\tzpentry{ID11380}{Hyperspherical Proper Distance}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For fixed comoving angular coordinate chi, proper distance is scale radius times chi.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
D(t)=R(t)\chi
